This festival performance culmination entire marching band season. judges will evaluate each marching band following criteria: music, general effect, visual performance, percussion, auxiliary. original text:
Centre Development Christian Ministry Trinity Theological College (TTC) which organises courses equip Christians lifelong learning, personal growth ministry will offering evening courses from September November 2016.
This historical survey Reformation. course traces circumstances that gave rise Reformation different religious, political cultural forces that coalesced birthing Protestant church. will examine lives legacies some prominent reformers implications Karl Barth's comment that "the church always reformed" (Ecclesia semper reformanda est) present times.
Instructor: Rev. Andrew faculty Trinity Theological College lectures area mission mission history. alumni college (TTC) Asbury Theological Seminary interests history Christianity Asia mission trends 21st century. also serves Chinese Annual Conference Methodist Church Singapore diaconal minister appointed Charis Methodist Church.
Various ethical issues challenge Christians today: some result increased sophistication pervasiveness technology, others dilemmas which arise because Christian values variance with world's. Since these issues often contentious divisive, Christians need develop theological framework able salt light society, with posture humility grace articulating Christian view. This course will give opportunity grow this knowledge develop these skills.
Instructor: Kiem Kiok teaches East Asia School Theology areas Intercultural Studies well ethics. worked both para-church organisations well home church, Trinity Methodist Church. When she's working, enjoys listening classical music reading detective novels.
more information, please visit www.ttc.edu.sg contact Esther telephone 67613624 Email cdcm@ttc.edu.sg. register, click here.

hard choice NOT, definition, amoral choice.
actor makes choice without reference moral ramifications actions making amoral choice. actor considers moral ramifications, least knows what moral ramifications are, then, deliberately willfully, acts knows wrong, making immoral choice.
Marlowe does neither these. Faced with difficult dilemma, always considers moral ramifications, then tries take most moral course available him. That harm sometimes comes because chosen course what makes dilemma. make decision, knowing that harm will come about whatever does, does best, with knowledge hand, circumstances which finds himself, given obligations ethically bound live make most moral choice. agonizing over consequences decisions what makes moral man. considering, almost reflex, moral ramifications choices trying choose morally correct course what makes them moral choices.

original text:
From Prompt Vault What's *YOUR* Magic?
Working premise that everyone magic what's your magic? define
Tunissoo (tonissoo@ra.gov.ee), November 1999.
magic being able fade into background, unnoticed, just *observe* people things.
Tree November 1999.
things come mind, which makes think don't have good grip that kind place today, here anyway.
Resilient courageousness seem keep coming back face [difficult] things, embrace them healing growth.
Accepting what with loving-kindness.
these days feel stirrings deep joyfulness celebration. think will take while that part magic, though.
Chris November 1999.
Magic charms contol events; illusion. What's charm, then? spin everyday into gold? have clue. thing like most about myself that wade worry problem like with bone, wrestle into submission fall back pant revived again. slog, plod don't give until damn good ready. Doesn't feel very magical, though.
Catherine November 1999.
~AWARENESS~Being able beyond everyday dribble.The ability survive based personal belief system that very awareness, that this that everything possible.I blessed with ability through eyes artist,hear with ears musician,smell with scent coonhound,play guitar with hands ancestors,and speak with honesty child.On heightened travel worlds beyond this those senses merge into hell spiritual experience. Over all, "MAGIC MAGIC!"
Donna Carter November 1999.
extreme curiousity, learn, meet, understand something other than norm. this leads dedication, motivation.
grasp "inner child".
November 1999.
ability when write when *really* write instead tune something bigger. Witness last night's magic: really pushing, pulling, coaxing, stroking waiting trying something worthwhile Synchronicity.
that ain't magic, don't know what
Nancy Birnes November 1999.
magic, think, comfort. quietly with those pain. know someone needs soft blanket, dirty joke, listening ear. know change feel angry room. spells filled with candles, wind, cats, strong coffee, homemade soups, books cinnamon. They dusty strong spells, hear them weaved into Catherine's writings that makes smile. wish times wild, intense magic! can't sing dance, don't turn mens heads when walk down street...but thats okay. think magic element earth.
Eloise (tiss57@hotmail.com), November 1999.
special November 1999.
Creation magic. Whether fathering children imagining worlds, creation king.
alive well Nova Notes.
Schroeder November 1999.
i've been thinking about this, over over again, since posted questions. can't magic. have this deeprooted disbelief that exists. sure, there moments when feel like queen world, spinning around, stirring people with crazy ideas open eyes.
maybe it's just that dazzled magic others, magic around
heyoka (katie@heyoka.com), November 1999.
magic secret world spin around myself. Gossamer silk that encloses places, captures many ideas, impassions creativity lets outside give take ordinary life. Secret thoughts, secret visits, secret writing...even very secret people. everything have open book, then there place retire when weight grows heavy. secret world also Achilles heel, because when things wrong within this private place can't tell anyone, can't even express distress those around Like most magic, secrets both ways.
Michele November 1999.
Occasionally (far from usually), just... *shine*. People attracted sight. Sometimes sexually, more often just curious know better. it's glow, sparkle we're talking 200W incandescent lightbulb here. S'been curse often blessing. only happens occasionally. think it's related manic part SADD, though directly related. Anyway.
marianne aldrich November 1999.
Heyoka said: "maybe it's just that dazzled magic others, magic around me."
say, that your magic, Heyoka! That AWARE that beauty, grandeur, quiet simplicity, forth! THIS what claim too, magic. awareness magic, both within those private moments with self, when simply awed beauty's sake, communion with others. That capture just small part this creations gives joy.
